full_text:
Xue Qiu (Zichun) 薛秋 (子春)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Qiu (薛秋), styledZichun (子春), was born in Anping village, Dong township, Zhuyi county, Pei state. Likely of the same clan as Xue Zong. Died at the age of 65. Xue Qiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
